title: Is Unity Software Ready To Rally After Rejecting AppLovin Offer?
text: Unity Software has been on a wild ride after reporting better-than-expected earnings, but then rejecting a buyout offer by AppLovin. Is it ready to rally again?

title: Unity Software Saw Strong Growth in This Key Area, and Nobody Even Noticed
text: While investors focused on Unity's merger news, the company saw huge progress in one area in its second quarter.

title: Unity's Major Move Has 1 Top Competitor Shaking in Its Boots
text: Tell me Unity is on the right path without telling me it's on the right path.

title: Unity shares drop over 6% after board rejects acquisition by AppLovin
text: Gaming software company Unity rejected AppLovin's proposal to buy the company for $20 billion.

title: Unity Stock Slumps as Board Rejects AppLovin's Buyout Offer
text: It seems that there's a soap opera going on between Unity Software (NYSE: U ), AppLovin (NASDAQ: APP ) and ironSource (NYSE: IS ). Last week, AppLovin bid to buy out Unity Software.

title: Unity rejects AppLovin's $20 billion merger offer
text: Unity announced this morning that it is committed to its merger with ironSource and will reject AppLovin's $20 billion proposal. Last month, the news broke that Unity — a widely-used game engine — would merge with ironSource, a mobile app monetization and distribution company.

title: Unity Software stock slumps after Applovin's $20 billion buyout bid was rejected
text: Shares of Unity Software Inc. U, +7.78% slumped 4.3% in premarket trading Monday, after the video gaming software company said it rejected Applovin Corp.'s APP, +5.40% unsolicited buyout bid valued at $20 billion submitted last week. The company said after a "thorough" evaluation of Applovin's bid, the board of directors unanimously determined it is not in the best interest of its shareholders to accept the bid, and it doesn't represent a "superior proposal" as defined by the merger deal with ironSource Ltd.

title: Unity Is On the Right Path -- Even Without AppLovin
text: Unity has to choose between two paths, and it's choosing the right one.

title: 7 Stock Price Predictions That Are Actually Worth Listening To
text: Generally, Wall Street stock price predictions are hardly the best source of investing ideas that have the most upside. Investors should interpret stocks that analysts claim have the most upside carefully.

title: Why the Market Had No Love for AppLovin Stock Today
text: What is its future as a stand-alone public company?

title: Is AppLovin Stock a Buy Now?
text: The mobile ad tech company surprised investors with a bid for Unity Software.

title: Software company acquisitions are a bullish sign for the sector's stocks, Cramer says
text: "The long software nightmare may finally be over," Jim Cramer said.

title: Applovin stock falls after outlook cut amid big offer for Unity Software
text: Applovin Inc. shares fell in the extended session Wednesday after the app-monetization company said it was rolling back its outlook for the year a day after it offered $20 billion to buy Unity Software Inc.

title: AppLovin Announces Second Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP) (“AppLovin”), a leading marketing platform, today announced financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2022 and posted a Shareholder Letter and Financial Update at www.investors.applovin.com. Webcast and Conference Calls AppLovin will host a webinar today at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET, during which management will discuss second quarter 2022 results, provide commentary on business performance and discuss the non-binding proposal1 to combine with Unity we announced yesterday. A question-and-answer session will follow the prepared remarks. The webinar may be accessed on the Company’s investor relations website or via the following dial-in number: 1-669-900-6833 and using webinar ID: 961 9876 0571. A replay of the webinar will also be available under the Events & Presentations section of our Investor Relations website. About AppLovin AppLovin's leading marketing software platform provides app developers with a powerful, integrated set of solutions to solve their mission-critical functions like user acquisition, monetization and measurement. AppLovin is headquartered in Palo Alto, California with several offices globally. Source: AppLovin Corp. _____________________________ 1 AppLovin Submits a Compelling Non-Binding Proposal to Combine with Unity (https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220809005530/en/AppLovin-Submits-a-Compelling-Non-Binding-Proposal-to-Combine-with-Unity)

title: Call of Duty app developer Unity is target of AppLovin takeover
text: Gaming software company Applovin Corp made an offer to buy larger sector peer Unity Software, also a video gaming software development company. The deal is believed to be in the region of US$17bn, with AppLovin offering US$58.85 for each share in Unity, an 18% premium to its Monday closing price.

title: Unity losses less than feared, outlook trimmed as Applovin makes $20 billion bid for company
text: On the same day it received an offer to acquire the company for roughly $20 billion, Unity Software Inc. reported a less-than-feared loss and pulled back on its guidance for the year, and shares slipped in the extended session.

title: AppLovin Makes $20B Offer to Acquire Unity
text: Unity says its framework powers 70% of the top mobile games.

title: Why AppLovin Stock Cratered on Tuesday
text: The app-based marketing platform has made an audacious offer to buy Unity Software.

title: AppLovin wants to buy video game maker Unity for $20 billion
text: A year after going public, app growth and monetization agency AppLovin submitted an unsolicited proposal today to buy the game engine Unity in a deal worth $20 billion. But there's a catch: Unity would have to terminate its recent deal to merge with ironSource, an AppLovin competitor.

title: Unity Software Has a Choice to Make: AppLovin or ironSource
text: The wrong choice could hinder Unity's future growth.

title: U Stock Pops as AppLovin Seeks to Buy Unity Software
text: In a hot press release from this morning, it was revealed that AppLovin (NASDAQ: APP ) expressed interest in combining with Unity Software (NYSE: U ). The estimated enterprise value of this deal would be $20 billion.

title: AppLovin offers to buy video game software maker Unity in $17.5 billion deal
text: (Reuters) -Gaming software company AppLovin Corp on Tuesday made an offer to buy peer Unity Software Inc in a $17.54 billion all-stock deal, looking to tap into growing demand for three-dimensional gaming.

title: Applovin submits bid to buy Unity Software in a deal valued at $20 billion
text: Shares of video gaming software company Unity Software Inc. U, +3.54% rallied 11.0% in premarket trading, while Applovin Corp.'s stock APP, +10.09% tumbled 10.0%, after Applovin said it submitted and unsolicited bid to buy Unity in an all-stock deal with an enterprise value of $20 billion. Under terms of the deal, marketing software company Applovin said it will exchange 1.152 of its Class A shares and 0.314 of its Class C shares for each Unity share outstanding.
